annotator_steps: Locate the subsection about the local-part of a mailbox address.
Read the sentence stating the maximum total length in octets.
Read the abstract rather than only the aphorism list.
Notice the distinction between the intended total number of aphorisms and the number written down.
Extract the written-down count from the abstract sentence.
Open the National Archives Declaration timeline page.
Identify the July 4 adoption entry and avoid treating it as the signing date.
Locate the later entry that explicitly describes when most delegates signed the engrossed copy.
Extract the date from that entry.
